title: Spinbot!!1!
description: It's just a mod that allows you to spin in various different ways via /spin
body:
![preview](https://i.imgur.com/BjvqmLu.gif)

A little mod that allows you to spin at any speed you want!



## Available commands (1.4.1):

**/spin** - Regular spinning in either direction. Specify speed (Number) (Positive = Clockwise spinning, Negative = Anti-clockwise spinning)

**/spinangle** - Spin only a specific number of degrees. First specify the amount of degrees to turn (Number), then specify the speed (Number)

**/spinpong** - Spin only between two set angles. First specify an angle (Number), then the speed (Number)

**/spinramp** - Ramps up the speed of your spinning from 0 to set value. Specify ramp up speed (Number) followed up the speed you want to remain at (Number)

**/spinsound** - Turns on/off clicky clacky sounds when doing some of the spin commands. Specify true / false to turn on or off the sounds

**/spinstop** - Stops all spinning commands

**V** - Configurable shortcut to Start / Stop Spin commands. Change the key from Settings > Options > Controls

## Demos

/spinramp command _( /spinramp 10 5000 )_
![/spinramp command in action](https://i.imgur.com/pnSOznW.gif)

/spinpong command _( /spinpong 30 4000 )_
![/spinpong command in action](https://i.imgur.com/2od6581.gif)

/spinpong vertical command _( /spinpong 30 5000 vert )_
![/spinpong vertical command in action](https://i.imgur.com/PcgBsbq.gif)

## Extra Notes

**This mod may give an unfair advantage in multiplayer servers.**

**This mod may make you dizzy if used too much.**

**This is a stupid mod, please don't download.**
